languages.text: {n}Батошски выжидающе смотрит на вас, словно зверь, подобравшийся для прыжка. У капитана-интенданта же глаз расширяется от страха, и одними губами она шепчет:{/n} "Не надо".
{n}Batoshski watches you expectantly, like a beast coiled to spring. But the captain-quartermaster's eye widens in terror, her lips silently mouthing,{/n} "Don't."
languages.original_text: {n}Батошски выжидающе смотрит на вас, словно зверь, подобравшийся для прыжка. У капитана-интенданта же глаз расширяется от страха, и одними губами она шепчет:{/n} "Не надо".

traits.locale_text: {n}Batoshski watches you expectantly, like a beast coiled to spring. The captain-quartermaster's eye widens in terror, her lips silently mouthing:{/n} "Don't."
{n}Batoshski watches you expectantly, like a beast coiled to spring. The captain-quartermaster's eye widens in terror, her lips silently mouthing:{/n} "Don't."
{n}Batoshski watches you expectantly, like a beast coiled to spring. But the captain-quartermaster's eye widens in terror, her lips silently mouthing,{/n} "Don't."
{n}Batoshski watches you expectantly, like a beast coiled to spring. But the captain-quartermaster's eye widens in terror, her lips silently mouthing,{/n} "Don't."

languages.text: {n}巴托什斯基满怀期待地望着你，如野兽般蓄势待发。但军需官上尉的那只眼睛却惊恐地瞪大了，嘴唇无声地说着：{/n}“不要。”
languages.original_text: {n}Batoshski watches you expectantly, like a beast coiled to spring. But the captain-quartermaster's eye widens in terror, her lips silently mouthing,{/n} "Don't."

traits.locale_text: {n}巴托什斯基满怀期待地望着你，如野兽般蓄势待发。但军需官上尉的那只眼睛却惊恐地瞪大了，嘴唇无声地说着：{/n}“不要。”

languages.text: {n}Batoshski, sıçramaya hazırlanan bir hayvan gibi sana beklentiyle bakıyor. Ancak Levazımcı Yüzbaşı'nın gözü dehşetle açılıyor, dudakları sessizce "yapma" der gibi oynuyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Batoshski watches you expectantly, like a beast coiled to spring. But the captain-quartermaster's eye widens in terror, her lips silently mouthing,{/n} "Don't."

traits.locale_text: {n}Batoshski, sıçramaya hazırlanan bir hayvan gibi sana beklentiyle bakıyor. Ancak Levazımcı Yüzbaşı'nın gözü dehşetle açılıyor, dudakları sessizce "yapma" der gibi oynuyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Le regard que Batoshski vous lance est celui d'un prédateur prêt à bondir, mais la capitaine-quartier-maître écarquille les yeux et ses lèvres remuent silencieusement pour dire :{/n} « Non. »
languages.original_text: {n}Batoshski watches you expectantly, like a beast coiled to spring. But the captain-quartermaster's eye widens in terror, her lips silently mouthing,{/n} "Don't."

traits.locale_text: {n}Le regard que Batoshski vous lance est celui d'un prédateur prêt à bondir, mais la capitaine-quartier-maître écarquille les yeux et ses lèvres remuent silencieusement pour dire :{/n} « Non. »

languages.text: {n}Batoshski te observa expectante, como una bestia en un resorte. Pero los ojos de la capitana intendente se abren aterrados, y sus labios se mueven para decir sin sonido:{/n} «No».
languages.original_text: {n}Batoshski watches you expectantly, like a beast coiled to spring. But the captain-quartermaster's eye widens in terror, her lips silently mouthing,{/n} "Don't."

traits.locale_text: {n}Batoshski te observa expectante, como una bestia en un resorte. Pero los ojos de la capitana intendente se abren aterrados, y sus labios se mueven para decir sin sonido:{/n} «No».

languages.text: {n}Batoshski beobachtet dich erwartungsvoll wie eine sprungbereite Bestie. Die Augen der Captain-Quartiermeisterin weiten sich entsetzt, als sie lautlos haucht:{/n} "Nicht."
languages.original_text: {n}Batoshski watches you expectantly, like a beast coiled to spring. But the captain-quartermaster's eye widens in terror, her lips silently mouthing,{/n} "Don't."

traits.locale_text: {n}Batoshski beobachtet dich erwartungsvoll wie eine sprungbereite Bestie. Die Augen der Captain-Quartiermeisterin weiten sich entsetzt, als sie lautlos haucht:{/n} "Nicht."

languages.text: {n}バトシュスキーは、まるで飛びかかりそうな野獣のように、あなたを期待して見つめている。しかし、船長兼大工の目は恐怖で大きく開き、唇は{/n}「やめろ」と無言で口ずさむ。
languages.original_text: {n}Batoshski watches you expectantly, like a beast coiled to spring. But the captain-quartermaster's eye widens in terror, her lips silently mouthing,{/n} "Don't."

traits.locale_text: {n}バトシュスキーは、まるで飛びかかりそうな野獣のように、あなたを期待して見つめている。しかし、船長兼大工の目は恐怖で大きく開き、唇は{/n}「やめろ」と無言で口ずさむ。
